# Artificial Neural Networks

**Summary**: A computational model used for pattern recognition and classification of geological data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-el-kheir|El-Kheir, 2013]] used artificial neural networks to classify lithofacies based on five well log parameters.
